blocks.text: This document owns lock usage policy in domain language. The concrete `flock` or DB lease primitive is owned by C9 Locking.

rows: Prevent adapter, RunController, and validation from mutating the same workdir concurrently

items: Do not wrap an entire agent run in `repo_lock`; same-repo tasks must not become globally serialized.
Do not use one task's `task_workdir.lock` to protect another task's workdir; isolation is directory separation plus protected path and sandbox policy.

blocks.text: When multiple daemons share one host/cache, `repo_cache_update.lock` is meaningful. Cross-host cache sharing is outside this SSOT and normally uses host-local caches.
